name: Q&A — Accepted Answer
description: First-party dogfood plugin. Turns a topic into a Q&A: a permitted user marks one reply as the accepted answer, shown with a badge in the per-post slot. Exercises every module seam — a domain-event listener, a post.html content filter ([answer] callouts), a UI slot, a plugin-owned migration, plugin settings, a permission, and routes — entirely through the public contract, with zero core edits.
author: The NovFora Authors

permissions.label: Mark a post as the accepted answer
permissions.description: Lets the holder mark one reply in a topic as its accepted answer.
